_comment2: TextureId = Roblox CONTENT ID (the number inside the Decal, NOT the Decal page URL).
_comment3: To find TextureId: open decal in Studio → click → look at Properties → Texture → copy the number.

BarDecal._comment: Default bar background for ALL users. Override per-user in their section.

RankIcons._comment: Badge shown on left of bar + far-distance icon. Use TextureId (content ID).

Owners._comment: BarTextureId/BarVideoId override the default bar for this user only.

CustomTags._comment: Per-user overrides. Gets Member rank icon unless you add a custom RankTextureId.

Animations._comment: Glitch / Bounce / Scroll. Everyone else defaults to Scroll.

Fonts._comment: GothamBlack, GothamBold, Gotham, Code, Arcade, Fantasy
